prompt_rules: same character identity and scale in every frame

prompt:
Original high-resolution pixel-art NPC sprite sheet for a bright mythical-Japan action RPG: a cheerful young village woman (a peasant farmer, NOT a shrine maiden, NOT a samurai, NOT a ninja), early twenties, warm brown hair in a simple low bun with a small indigo cloth band, a short cream-and-indigo kasuri work kimono with sleeves tied back by a vermilion tasuki cord, a wrapped work apron over loose calf-length trousers, straw zori. Kind friendly face. PROPORTION LOCK: match the body build, sturdiness, head-to-body ratio and overall scale of the attached reference character EXACTLY - the same sturdy roughly 3-head proportions and the same solid body width. The villager must NOT be thinner, lankier, longer-legged or more big-headed than the reference. Only the clothes, hair and face differ (as described); the BODY PROPORTIONS, build and SCALE match the reference. front view facing the viewer, idle standing with feet a natural shoulder-width apart. 4-frame IDLE LOOP in one row of 4 equal cells: frame1 = neutral, frame2 = slow breath, frame3 = a warm blink and small smile, frame4 = back to neutral so it loops. Same identity, same pose footprint and the SAME scale in every cell, centered with clear margin, feet on the same ground line, crisp high-resolution pixel art with a dark one-pixel outline. No text.
Avoid: no Mario/Nintendo/Zelda/Final Fantasy/Pokemon/Dragon Quest/Secret of Mana/Okami/Sakuna characters, logos or likeness, no samurai armor, no kabuto helmet, no ninja outfit, no two-sword daisho, no gun, no modern objects, no horror mood, no dark gloomy palette, no bird or companion creature in the sheet, no letter emblems, no modern text/watermark/UI.
Output: crisp high-resolution 16-bit-style pixel art with fine readable pixel clusters, dark one-pixel outline, top-left light source, bright cheerful colors, solid #FF00FF magenta background filling all empty space, consistent identity and scale across frames.
